claim_boundary: Selection is not semantic verification. This manifest freezes candidates for later card-specific tests; no selected identity is semantic_verified by this artifact.

selected.catalog_name: Bala Ged Recovery // Bala Ged Sanctuary

eligibility: resolves to exactly one in-scope catalog Oracle identity
legacy source exists and matches at least one stratum predicate

exclusion_reason_codes.CATALOG_IDENTITY_AMBIGUOUS: More than one in-scope catalog identity matches the catalog name.
exclusion_reason_codes.CATALOG_IDENTITY_MISSING: No catalog identity matches the translation report's catalog name.
exclusion_reason_codes.CATALOG_IDENTITY_NOT_IN_SCOPE: Only catalog-only or out-of-scope identities match the catalog name.
exclusion_reason_codes.DUPLICATE_ORACLE_IDENTITY: An earlier priority entry already resolves to this Oracle identity.
exclusion_reason_codes.NO_SEMANTIC_STRATUM_MATCH: The emitted legacy script matches none of the frozen semantic predicates.
exclusion_reason_codes.STRATUM_QUOTA_FILLED: The entry matched a stratum whose higher-priority quota was already filled.
exclusion_reason_codes.TRANSLATION_NOT_EMITTED: The current translation report does not contain a compiler-emitted definition.

selection_policy.failure_mode: fail closed when an input schema, cross-count, source path, source name, or stratum quota is invalid
selection_policy.ordering: first repository priority rank within each stratum; final freeze ranks are repository priority order

strata.description: Counterspells and effects that grant hexproof or indestructible.
strata.predicate: legacy script has AB/SP/DB$ Counter or a hexproof/indestructible marker
legacy script has AB/SP/DB$ Destroy, or targeted battlefield ChangeZone to exile/hand/library/graveyard

strata.description: Effects that move a land card between zones as mana development.
strata.predicate: legacy script has AB/SP/DB$ ChangeZone with a Land ChangeType/ValidCard/ValidTgts marker
legacy script has AB/SP/DB$ Draw, Scry, or Discard

strata.description: Non-land tutoring, reanimation, recovery, and graveyard setup.
strata.predicate: legacy script has non-land AB/SP/DB$ ChangeZone with Origin$ Library or Graveyard

strata.description: Token creation and sacrifice-driven effects or costs.
strata.predicate: legacy script has AB/SP/DB$ Token, TokenScript$, Sac<...>, or Sacrifice text

strata.description: Zone, spell, combat, damage, and phase-triggered behavior.
strata.predicate: legacy script contains at least one T: trigger line

strata.description: Continuous modifiers, combat hooks, attachments, counters, and cost reduction.
strata.predicate: legacy script has Continuous/PumpAll/Attach/counter/Attacks/ReduceCost or a closed combat keyword marker

strata.description: Basic lands and activated or triggered mana production.
strata.predicate: legacy script has a Basic Land type or AB/SP/DB$ Mana
